title: dot-agents canonical hook bundle manifest
description: Repo-local JSON Schema for ~/.agents/hooks/<scope>/<name>/HOOK.yaml. Aligns with internal/platform/hooks.go hookManifest and docs/CANONICAL_HOOKS_DESIGN.md. Editors validating YAML should map this schema; runtime validation in the CLI is not required for correctness.

name.description: Stable logical hook id; defaults to bundle directory name if omitted in some loaders

when.description: Canonical lifecycle event. Common values include pre_tool_use, post_tool_use, session_start, user_prompt_submit, stop. Platform overrides may supply native event names.

expression.description: Richer matcher when token lists are insufficient

command.description: Command relative to hook bundle directory or absolute
